description_long: This object is a realistic crustacean, resembling a prawn or shrimp, displayed on a flat, light-colored surface. Its elongated body is segmented, with a prominent cephalothorax and a tapering abdomen ending in a fan-like tail. The crustacean features two large claws (chelae) at the front, several pairs of slender walking legs, and long, thin antennae extending from the head. The exoskeleton is glossy and semi-translucent, with a color gradient from brownish-gray on the back to lighter, almost translucent hues on the underside. The eyes are dark and positioned on short stalks at the front of the head, giving it a distinctive appearance.
description: A lifelike prawn or shrimp with a segmented, glossy exoskeleton, large claws, long antennae, and a fan-shaped tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the crustacean, highlighting the segmented body, claws, and antennae.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of legs, claws, and the fan-shaped tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the curvature of the body and the details of the legs and tail.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the claws, antennae, and the placement of the eyes on short stalks.
